name: Lauritz.com Group A/S
summary: Lauritz.com Group A/S provides online auction services. The company offers art, design, antiquities, and home luxury products through its Website. Its product categories also comprise furniture, art works, lighting, silver, ceramics, porcelain, vintage clothing, sculptures, designer electronics, toys, and others. The company serves trendsetters, pensioners, students, and top executives. It has 29 auction houses in 6 countries. The company was founded in 1885 and is based in S√É¬∏borg, Denmark. Lauritz.com Group A/S is a subsidiary of Blixtz Holding A/S.
